positive: Minimalist celestial creature, a stylized, ethereal fox composed of nebula gas and stardust, curled in a serene and symmetrical position. The fox has glowing cyan and indigo accents, with translucent, flowing tail plumes that trail cosmic energy. Surrounding the fox are highly detailed, stylized geometric constellations rendered in gold leaf lines. The background is a deep space void gradient, focusing the viewer entirely on the central silhouette. Artwork must have clean, sharp edges, high contrast, and be designed as a single, striking, isolated graphic print suitable for t-shirts. Inspired by Art Nouveau and modern geometric illustration. Full color palette, symmetrical composition, centered, highly detailed line work.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, low resolution, messy, dirty, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, muted colors, realistic photo, photographic, depth of field
